subject: Re: Audrey
body:
I'm sorry  , Audrey . I have plead guilty and gone to jail for one year.. lesley weill get me emails/

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, June 27, 2008 3:41:10 PM
Subject: FW: Audrey



-----Original Message-----
From: audrey@gmiproductions.com [mailto:audrey@gmiproductions.com] 
Sent: Friday, June 27, 2008 6:12 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Audrey

Hi Lesley,
I am still awaiting from Jeffrey's news...He is still home or did they came to pick him up?
Please le me know,I am worried about him.
If he is fine,ask him when am I going to see him?
Thanks a lot,
Audrey x

Audrey Raimbault
Founder President

GMI Productions Ltd
14 Market Mews,
London W1J 7BZ

Tél: +44 20 7495 1304
www.gmiproductions.com

Registered in England & Wales, no. 06040428
Registered office: 1 Doughty Street, London WC1N 2PH, England

NOTICE OF CONFIDENTIALITY:
The information contained in and transmitted with this e-mail message is PRIVILEGED AND/OR CONFIDENTIAL. It is intended only for the individual or entity designated above. 

-----Original Message-----
From: "Lesley Groff" <lesley@nysgllc.com>

Date: Fri, 13 Jun 2008 14:52:28 
To: <audrey@gmiproductions.com>
Subject: RE: Audrey


Hello Audrey!  I will let him know you are asking!  (btw-Kim is no longer with us!  She hasn't been for about 5 years or so!!)

Lesley

-----Original Message-----
From: audrey@gmiproductions.com [mailto:audrey@gmiproductions.com] 
Sent: Friday, June 13, 2008 2:34 PM
To: Helen Kim; Lesley Groff
Subject: Audrey

Hi Lesley,
Hi Kim,

I hope you are doing well.

Could you please give me some news about Jeffrey or can he call me back as I did not hear from him for more than 4 weeks.

Thanks a lot.
Kindest regards,
Audrey x


Audrey Raimbault
Founder President
